message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: blue-green stuck indefinitely during a scaling event with mission (#1131)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-2931-blue-green-stuck-indefinitely-during-a-scaling-event-with-pre",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: blue-green stuck indefinitely during a scaling event with prePromotionAnalysis & previewReplicaCount",
+    "description": "blue-green stuck indefinitely during a scaling event with prePromotionAnalysis & previewReplicaCount. This issue affects 27+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-rollouts troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-rollouts deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts
```
Argo Rollouts v1.4.0

We have the following rollout:

```yaml
  strategy:
    blueGreen:
      activeService: guestbook-prod
      autoPromotionEnabled: true
      prePromotionAnalysis:
        templates:
        - templateName:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for blue-green stuck indefinitely during a scaling event with…",
+        "description": "During a scaling event, we will now only perform scaling against our ReplicaSets, and only reconcile:
* `status.availableReplicas`
* `status.HPAReplicas`

This fixes a bug where we would lose some information in status (because we did not perform the normal full logic of reconciliation).
```yaml
strategy:
    blueGreen:
      activeService: guestbook-prod
      autoPromotionEnabled: true
      prePromotionAnalysis:
        templates:
        - templateName: guestbook-prod-synthetics
      previewReplicaCount: 1
      previewService: guestbook-prod-preview
      scaleDownDelayRevisionLimit: 3
      scaleDownDelaySeconds: 21600
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm blue-green stuck indefinitely during a scaling… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "During a scaling event, we will now only perform scaling against our ReplicaSets, and only reconcile:
* `status.availableReplicas`
* `status.HPAReplicas`

This fixes a bug where we would lose some information in status (because we did not perform the normal full logic of reconciliation).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "strategy:
    blueGreen:
      activeService: guestbook-prod
      autoPromotionEnabled: true
      prePromotionAnalysis:
        templates:
        - templateName: guestbook-prod-synthetics
      previewReplicaCount: 1
      previewService: guestbook-prod-preview
      scaleDownDelayRevisionLimit: 3
      scaleDownDelaySeconds: 21600",
+        ""2023-07-31T17:57:31Z","""guestbook-prod""","""guestbook""","Started syncing rollout"
"2023-07-31T17:57:31Z","""guestbook-prod""","""guestbook""","Syncing replicas only due to scaling event"
"2023-07-31T17:57:31Z",,,"Event(v1.ObjectReference{Kind:\""Rollout\"", Namespace:\""guestbook\"", Name:\""guestbook-prod\"", UID:\""11111111-2222-3333-4444-5555555555\"", APIVersion:\""argoproj.io/v1alpha1\"", ResourceVersion:\""1301676025\"", FieldPath:\""\""}): type: 'Normal' reason: 'ScalingReplicaSet' Scaled down ReplicaSet guestbook-prod-945f86b8d (revision 1578) from 11 to 10"
"2023-07-31T17:57:31Z","""guestbook-prod""","""guestbook""","Scaled down ReplicaSet guestbook-prod-945f86b8d (revision 1578) from 11 to 10"
"2023-07-31T17:57:31Z","""guestbook-prod""","""guestbook""","Scaled down ReplicaSet",
+        "{
    "status": {
        "blueGreen": {
            "prePromotionAnalysisRunStatus": null     // <<<<<<<<< this should not have happened
        },
        "conditions": [
            {
                "lastTransitionTime": "2023-04-04T15:42:04Z",
                "lastUpdateTime": "2023-04-04T15:42:04Z",
                "message": "Rollout is paused",
                "reason": "RolloutPaused",
                "status": "False",
                "type": "Paused"
            },
            {
                "lastTransitionTime": "2023-07-31T17:52:17Z",
                "lastUpdateTime": "2023-07-31T17:52:17Z",
                "message": "Rollout is not healthy",
                "reason": "RolloutHealthy",
                "status": "False",
                "type": "Healthy"
            },
    "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-rollouts",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-rollouts"
+    ],

+    },
